name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Fork ownership *)
ForkOwner(i) == forks[i]

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ IsThinking(i)
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ IsHungry(i)
       /\ forks[Left(i)] = "free" /\ forks[Right(i)] = "free"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ IsEating(i)
       /\ forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = "free", ![Right(i)] = "free"]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  \/ /\ count = 0
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count
        /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, LOSS_PROB
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, file, lostChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(0..255))
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ lostChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ ackedChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ lostChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ i \notin lostChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks :
        /\ i \notin lostChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ \E i \in lostChunks :
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \setminus {i}
    \/ \E i \in ackedChunks :
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
    \/ /\ Len(chunks) = 0
        /\ file' = <<>>
        /\ chunks' = <<>>
        /\ sentChunks' = <<>>

        /\ lostChunks' = <<>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> offsets[i]]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>
